message:
fix(term): handle zero scrollback correctly with tiered scrollback enabled

When scrollback_size is 0, the tiered hot-line calculation incorrectly
returned 1 instead of 0 due to .max(1) clamping. This caused history
lines to accumulate despite an explicit zero scrollback budget. Also
fixes scrollback_warm_max_mb validator cap from 1TB to 1GB. Adds two
regression tests for zero-scrollback with and without tiering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
